label: More than interpreters
heading: Deaf access consultancy for live events
body: Most agencies supply interpreters. We design the entire access experience. From legal compliance and access audits through to production coordination and on-the-day management — PI advises, plans, and delivers. It's why the organisations that take Deaf access seriously work with us.

services.title: Legal & Compliance Advisory
services.description: We helped establish the legal precedent that BSL access at live events is a requirement, not a courtesy. We advise on your obligations under the Equality Act 2010 so you're covered — not just compliant.

services.title: Access Audits
services.description: We assess your current Deaf access provision and tell you what's working, what's missing, and what good looks like. Honest, practical recommendations — not a generic checklist.

services.title: Interpreter Team Design
services.description: The right number of interpreters, the right specialisms, the right rotation schedule. We design teams around your event — not the other way around.

services.title: Production Coordination
services.description: Sight-line placement, lighting requirements, stage positioning, comms with your production crew. We handle the technical integration so interpreting actually works on the day.

ctaLabel: Talk to us about your access needs
